title: nengella affinis
intro: Nengella affinis, also known as the "Bark of Nengella", is a plant species belonging to the Melastomataceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Nengella affinis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune system function. Traditionally, Nengella affinis is prepared as a decoction by boiling the bark in water, which is then used as a treatment for various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections.
